title: Best Subs
wikitext:
[]: Best Subs?             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Wed Jul 16, 2014 10:28 pm Reading the Evangelion commentary has made me realize that the ADV translations may not be the best. I know there are some fan subs out there that are more faithful than the ADV ones. What do you guys think? Which subs are the best subs?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Jul 16, 2014 11:57 pm The subs in the Platinum edition of Evangelion are IIRC regarded as the best translations. We actually do some in-house translation here (a la fangeek commentary), but the Platinum is the best official release.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 17, 2014 8:54 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Platinum is the best official release.

[]:             Quote Post by Compiling_Autumn » Thu Jul 17, 2014 12:14 pm what are some noticeable differences in phrasing between Perfect and Platinum? I have Perfect on my shelf and haven't seen Platinum yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Thu Jul 17, 2014 12:52 pm Unless I'm mistaken, doesn't the Platinum boxset lack the scripts and stuff that came with the individual volumes?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Jul 17, 2014 4:15 pm Depends, because there are several packagings of Platinum. The six-disk version is missing extras and so on, but is favoured for its higher data rate. My seven disk set in a tin box has a booklet that contains everything that's in the leaflets with the individual disks plus some cards and photos, for instance.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Jul 17, 2014 4:18 pm I have the platinum holiday special edition, which didn't come with anything asides the disks.
